title: Chamaecrista psoraleopsis
taxonomy: Chamaecrista psoraleopsis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a member of the genus Chamaecrista, which contains around 200 species of shrubs and herbs. The genus Chamaecrista is further classified under the subfamily Caesalpinioideae and the tribe Cercideae. Chamaecrista psoraleopsis is native to Africa, where it is often found in dry areas. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics.
uses: Chamaecrista psoraleopsis is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Asia. More research is needed to confirm the efficacy of Chamaecrista psoraleopsis in treating various medical conditions.
